title: Zimbabwe captain Sikandar Raza 15 runs away from making T20I history vs India
description: Zimbabwe captain Sikandar Raza is on the verge of a historic T20I milestone, needing just 15 runs to become the first Zimbabwean to reach 3000 international runs. He aims to achieve this in their crucial Super Eight match against defending champions India.  This encounter is vital for both teams' semi-final aspirations in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup.

title: 'Yadav Ji ki...' doesn't defame community: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court has dismissed a plea to ban or alter the title of the film 'Yadav Ji ki Love Story'. Justices Nagarathna and Bhuyan found no negative portrayal of the Yadav community in the title, deeming the petitioner's concerns 'wholly unfounded'.

description: Telangana's monthly salary and pension bill has quadrupled to Rs 6,000 crore in a decade, with power utility chief engineers earning up to Rs 7 lakh and senior Class 4 employees around Rs 2 lakh. This surge, driven by successive pay revisions, has intensified competition for government jobs, despite the state's strong economic performance and revenue growth.

title: Bill Gates admits affairs but denies involvement in Epstein crimes
description: Bill Gates has admitted making a "huge mistake" in associating with Jeffrey Epstein, telling staff at his charity foundation that he had affairs with two Russian women but denying involvement in the disgraced financier's crimes. "It was a huge mistake to spend time with Epstein" and to also bring Gates Foundation executives into meetings with Epstein, he said.

title: PM Modi becomes first world leader to cross 100 million Instagram followers
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has achieved a historic milestone. He is now the first world leader to surpass 100 million followers on Instagram. This achievement highlights his significant global digital reach. Modi's follower count far exceeds other prominent world leaders. His popularity continues to grow worldwide.

description: Vince McMahon, a titan of wrestling, faces legal battles including federal sex trafficking probes and SEC fines after exiting WWE.  Rumours swirl of a potential multi-billion dollar comeback bid, backed by Saudi investors, aiming to re-privatise the company.  Despite legal woes, his net worth remains substantial, and he's launched a new investment firm.

title: NHL Trade Rumors: Oilers stuck with $7.2 million player after trade talks suddenly fall apart
description: The Edmonton Oilers explored trading Andrew Mangiapane to the Toronto Maple Leafs in a cap motivated move, but talks stalled due to lack of interest. Mangiapane’s reduced role and modest production have made him a likely trade candidate. With the NHL deadline approaching, Edmonton remains active in reshaping its roster for a stronger playoff push.

The deal aims to bolster India's missile defense capabilities with Israeli systems like Iron Dome and Iron Beam, enhancing its security against aerial threats and fortifying its borders.

title: 4 passengers of US speedboat shot dead by Cuban coast guard
description: Cuba's coastguard shot dead four people and injured six others travelling in a US-registered speedboat in an exchange of fire off the Cuban coast on Wednesday, the interior ministry in Havana said. As a coastguard vessel approached to identify the boat "shots were fired from the boat," injuring the commander of the Cuban vessel, the ministry added.

Cigarettes after tax: The post-February crisis, & how smokers are reacting
description: India's recent steep cigarette tax hike has triggered immediate chaos, with prices soaring and supplies dwindling. Retailers are struggling, and consumers face inflated costs. This mirrors global trends where high taxes, without robust enforcement, fuel illicit trade and organized crime, potentially undermining public health goals and government revenue.

title: Told to pay, BJP MLA Chaudhary Babulal’s son slaps Agra toll plaza employee
description: Son of Fatehpur Sikri MLA Chaudhary Babulal allegedly slapped a toll employee at Raybha toll plaza after being asked to pay the toll fee due to a missing FASTag. The incident, captured on CCTV, was reportedly resolved amicably with the toll worker declining to file a complaint. The MLA, however, alleged abusive behavior from the toll staff.

title: Nissan Gravite: A value-driven seven-seater
description: The Nissan Gravite arrives at a time when Indian buyers are increasingly looking for practical, affordable three-row vehicles that can handle daily family duties without feeling like a compromise. It is not positioned as a premium people mover, but as a value-driven seven-seater that prioritises space, usability and running costs.

title: His grandfather gave British Rs 35k loan in 1917, now, MP man wants payback
description: A Sehore family is seeking to recover Rs 35,000 advanced by their grandfather to the British government in 1917. The prominent businessman's family claims the loan, made to the political agent in Bhopal, was never repaid. They are now exploring legal avenues to pursue this colonial-era financial claim against the United Kingdom.

title: Patrick, Brittany Mahomes’ $275M KC Current gain national spotlight after ESPN move
description: ESPN’s new programming shift and upcoming docuseries are set to boost visibility for the Kansas City Current, the NWSL club co-owned by Patrick and Brittany Mahomes. With Women’s Sports Sundays replacing a long-running broadcast slot and NWSL: The Final Third premiering soon, the move reflects growing demand for women’s sports and positions the Current for unprecedented national exposure.

title: Los Angeles Lakers eye $131M Cavaliers star; Austin Reaves trade key?
description: Los Angeles Lakers are reportedly eyeing Cleveland Cavaliers' Jarrett Allen before the 2026 trade deadline. The proposed deal involves sending Austin Reaves and future draft picks to Cleveland. This move aims to bolster the Lakers' frontcourt with much-needed size and defense, while the Cavaliers could gain scoring and guard play.
